requests.prompt: App Store screenshot for a wellness alarm app. iPhone 6.5 inch (1290x2796) vertical. Background cream (#FAF7F2) with subtle texture. Center: stylized phone screen showing a single task card with the text 'Write 3 things you're grateful for' as a clean typographic card. Above the phone, large bold sans-serif headline: 'One small ritual'. Below the phone, smaller text: 'every morning.' Bottom corner: 'Morning Ritual' wordmark. Aesthetic: clean, calm, premium wellness app, warm color palette #FF6B35 and #FAF7F2. Minimal, focused on the single idea.
